executives.name: James Litinsky
executives.background: Mr. Litinsky is the Founder, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of MP Materials. He is also the Founder and Chief Investment Officer of JHL Capital Group LLC. Before founding JHL Capital Group in 2006, he was a member of the investment team at Fortress Investment Group. He began his career at Omni-Offices. Mr. Litinsky serves on the boards of several organizations, including the Museum of Contemporary Art Chicago and the Shirley Ryan AbilityLab.

executives.name: Michael Rosenthal
executives.background: Mr. Rosenthal is the Founder and Chief Operating Officer of MP Materials. Prior to MP Materials, he was a Partner at JHL Capital Group LLC, where he led the firm's investment in the Mountain Pass rare earth mine. Before joining JHL Capital Group, he worked at QVT Financial LP. He serves on the board of the Rare Earth Industry Association.

executives.name: Ryan Corbett
executives.background: Mr. Corbett is the Chief Financial Officer of MP Materials. Prior to joining MP Materials, he was a Managing Director at JHL Capital Group LLC. Before JHL, he was an investment professional at King Street Capital Management and an investment banking analyst at Morgan Stanley.

executives.name: Elliot Hoops
executives.background: Mr. Hoops is the General Counsel and Secretary of MP Materials. Prior to joining MP Materials, he was Vice President and Deputy General Counsel at Hyatt Hotels Corporation. He previously practiced law at Latham & Watkins LLP and Wolf, Block, Schorr and Solis-Cohen LLP.

executives.name: Sheila Mossman
executives.background: Ms. Mossman is the Chief Accounting Officer of MP Materials. Prior to joining MP Materials, she served as Vice President and Controller of the Global Products business at Johnson Controls. She previously held various leadership roles at Tyco International and began her career at Deloitte & Touche LLP.

board_of_directors.name: James Litinsky
board_of_directors.background: Founder, Chairman and CEO of MP Materials. Founder and CIO of JHL Capital Group LLC.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Myers
board_of_directors.background: General Myers served as the 15th Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. He was the President of Kansas State University from 2016 to 2022. He serves on the boards of Aon plc and Rivian Automotive, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Maryanne Lavan
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Lavan is Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Lockheed Martin Corporation. She has held various leadership positions at Lockheed Martin since 1990.

board_of_directors.name: Connie Duckworth
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Duckworth is a retired Partner and Managing Director of Goldman Sachs. She is the Founder and CEO Emeritus of ARZU Inc. She serves on the boards of Steelcase Inc. and Equity Residential.

board_of_directors.name: Andrew McKnight
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McKnight is a Managing Partner of the Credit Funds at Fortress Investment Group LLC. He previously worked at Fir Tree Partners and Goldman Sachs.

board_of_directors.name: Daniel Gold
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gold is the CEO and Managing Partner of QVT Financial LP. He has been a director of various companies in the biotech and shipping industries.

board_of_directors.name: Randall Weisenburger
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Weisenburger is the Managing Member of Mile 26 Capital LLC. He was previously the CFO of Omnicom Group Inc. and a founding member of Wasserstein Perella & Co.
